rates.note: A rise in front-end yields can tighten financial conditions.

title: 2025-10-09 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 10.87
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-10-09: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 10.87/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-10-09, the score printed 10.87/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
